concept: ** This survival strategy game plunges players into a glacial apocalypse, where they must lead the last city of survivors, managing resources, assigning jobs, and rebuilding civilization. Core gameplay involves constructing and upgrading buildings, recruiting heroes with unique abilities, developing technology, and engaging in strategic combat to seize resources from beasts and rival chiefs on the ice field. Progression is multi-faceted, encompassing city expansion, technological advancement, hero development, and global competition for the "Strongest" title, often through alliances and player-versus-player battles. As a free-to-play title, monetization allows players to purchase in-game items with real money, such as resource bundles, speed-ups, or hero recruitment packs, to accelerate their progress, though it's not strictly necessary for enjoyment.
name: Whiteout Survival
